objective: Freeze a narrow entry-timing freshness gate definition to improve holdout profitability without touching exit management or position sizing.
hard_constraints: Do not change time stop 12 days.
Do not open parallel redesign tracks.
Do not reactivate freshness_gate_entry in this phase without a new explicit governance decision.
Do not change the official baseline.

freshness_gate_definition.what_freshness_means: Freshness means how many trading bars have passed since the official base entry signal for a ticker first became true in its current uninterrupted run.

measurement_variable.calculation_rule: For each ticker, reset the counter when phase_1_signal_layer1 is false. When phase_1_signal_layer1 becomes true after a false bar, freshness_age_bars = 0. Each consecutive true bar increments the counter by 1.

freshness_gate_definition.too_old_rule: A signal is too old for entry when freshness_age_bars > 0.
freshness_gate_definition.gate_pass_rule: The freshness gate passes only when freshness_age_bars == 0 on the signal bar.
freshness_gate_definition.gate_fail_rule: The freshness gate fails when freshness_age_bars >= 1 on the signal bar.
freshness_gate_definition.pipeline_touchpoint: Apply the gate on the entry-signal path after the official base signal is formed from phase_1_signal_layer1 and before any trade is emitted to Layer 4 sizing or Layer 5 exit handling.
what_does_not_change: Layer 3 remains optional default off and is not part of this hypothesis.
Layer 5 ATR14 x 2.5, trailing logic, and time stop 12 days do not change.
No additional confirmation or eligibility filter is introduced.

notes: Only one active hypothesis family is authorized.
No combined redesign with confirmation, regime, eligibility, or exit changes is authorized.
No secondary control axis is authorized in the first execution setup.

disallowed_changes: Any additional filter family beyond freshness timing.
sequencing_rules: This definition is now archived as a failed branch for this phase.
Only the newly selected governance hypothesis may become active next.
Do not combine two redesigns in one experiment pass.
exit_criteria: Freshness is defined explicitly as a single official entry-timing concept.
The measurement variable and gate pass/fail rule are frozen without ambiguity.
The pipeline touchpoint is defined explicitly.
The roadmap points directly to freshness gate execution setup after definition freeze.
Paper trading remains blocked and retest remains blocked.
